MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Andrew Lambert is present.
Attorney Susan Parkinson appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant William Schmidt is present.
Attorney Michael Sasser representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Jim Weixel, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

The case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of NOV-07-2011 remains on calendar.
